title: Movable Spawners
body:
# [This Project has been archived]

Have you ever wanted to move spawners in survival?

Well now with this one simple datapack you can!

Just Pick your Difficulty [Easy, Normal, Hard]

And you are good to go and move all the spawners you want!

 

PS. We do not reimburse any spawner lost to user carelessness 

!WARNING!  

The [NORMAL] and [HARD] mode have a custom method of moving spawner. There is current no in game indicator of how to do it so please look at the spoilers on how to do it!.

 

Custom Mechanics for [NORMAL] and [HARD] mode :

[NORMAL MODE] Only - Amethyst buds can be mined with a silk touch pickaxe
[HARD MODE] Only - Amethyst buds can be picked up whit a 3x3x3 Structure
Sparkling Diamond - Obtained by naming a Charged creeper Peter Then killing it
Spawner structures - Build a 3x3x3 or 5x5x5 (depending no difficulty) Structure and throw the Sparkling Diamond on top middle block.

 

The Packs difficulty's :

[EASY MODE]

Requirements :

- Silk touch pickaxe

Method :

- Just mine the Spawner 

Example :

 

[NORMAL MODE]

Requirements :

  • Silk touch pickaxe
  • 8 Amethyst Buds
  • 6 Tinted Glass 
  • 12 Iron Blocks
  • 1 Sparkling Diamond

Method :

- You need to build a 3x3x3 structure then throw the Sparkling Diamond on top middle block.

Example :

 - Layer 1

 - Layer 2

 - Layer 3

 

[HARD MODE]

Requirements :

  • 8 Amethyst Buds:

Total Item Count :

  • 96 Iron Blocks
  • 64 Gold Blocks
  • 48 Tinted Glass
  • 8 Sparkling Diamonds

Requirements :

  • 8 Gold Blocks
  • 6 Tinted Glass 
  • 12 Iron Blocks
  • 1 Sparkling Diamond

Method :

- You need to build a 3x3x3 structure then throw the Sparkling Diamond on top middle block.

Example :

 - Layer 1

 - Layer 2

 - Layer 3

  • 66 Tinted Glass 
  • 24 Iron Blocks
  • 8 Diamond Blocks
  • 8 Netherite Blocks
  • 8 Obsidian
  • 4 Black Concrete
  • 1 Sparkling Diamond

Method :

- You need to build a 5x5x5 structure then throw the Sparkling Diamond on top middle block.

Example :

 - Layer 1

 - Layer 2

 - Layer 3

 - Layer 4

 - Layer 5
